notes: Developer backend UI module entitlement, independent login configuration, true Host portal login, system announcement lifecycle, system config/API Key lifecycle, platform plan lifecycle, AI/OCR configuration lifecycle, third-party integration/security/monitoring/logs lifecycle, payments/invoices/storage observability, tenant CRUD/users/password/recycle-bin lifecycle, enterprise main dashboard real-summary lifecycle, enterprise subscription plan lifecycle, finance dashboard real-summary data, contract construction progress receipt, contract P&L detail API/UI coverage, WMS material catalog CRUD/export, WMS inbound Excel import/export/delete-preview, WMS delivery order export/OCR upload guard, WMS return Excel import/export/delete-preview, WMS outbound create/export/delete-preview, WMS transfer create/export/delete-preview, and WMS inventory/work-team ledger export net-quantity coverage are covered by real Chrome. S35 covers developer-scoped tenant user/role/password APIs, tenant search parameter compatibility, React confirm callbacks, and permanent tenant delete / clear recycle bin dependency cleanup. Per the user confirmation, WMS inventory alert / 库存预警 is out of product scope and must not be restored or included in future acceptance matrices. Product Green remains Yellow until production DNS/reverse-proxy/certificate validation, real third-party face gateway credentials, and exhaustive historical-page CRUD/upload/download coverage are complete. Claude CLI was attempted for S35/S36 but timed out after 90s/60s/60s and is recorded as Yellow external-tool evidence. S37 developer /dev dashboard real-summary API-vs-UI and quick action flow verified in real Chrome; focused 1/1, verify, full Chrome 33/33, code-review-graph risk 0.50; Claude budget/timeout Yellow. S38 public registration + original tenant-code login closure verified in real Chrome; focused 1/1, verify, full Chrome 34/34, code-review-graph risk 0.50; Claude no-output timeout Yellow.
